title: B@'er #0883
definition:
Beer-lahai-roi = "well of the Living One seeing me"

 1) a well west of Kadesh, south of Israel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beer-lahai-roi = "well of the Living One seeing me"

 1) a well west of Kadesh, south of Israel

    NASB:  well of the living One that sees me, a place in the desert
